# Acid Treatment

**Summary**: The use of hydrochloric acid to dissolve carbonate matrix from samples containing agglutinated foraminifera.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] applied the HCl method to extract and preserve the morphology of agglutinated foraminifera in the Scaglia Rossa Formation.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Samples extracted using the HCl method showed excellent preservation, allowing for the resolution of morphological features. ([[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024, p. 57]])
